name: edge-blur
description: Stacked backdrop-blur layers with a gradient mask for soft top or bottom screen edges

registry_item.name: edge-blur
registry_item.description: Stacked backdrop-blur layers with a gradient mask for soft top or bottom screen edges

visual_summary: An edge blur effect that can be applied to the top or bottom of the viewport. It is used for creating an atmospheric effect. It can also be used for design purposes such as creating subtle shadows or adding depth to the design.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: edge-blur
Description: An edge blur effect that can be applied to the top or bottom of the viewport. It is used for creating an atmospheric effect. It can also be used for design purposes such as creating subtle shadows or adding depth to the design.
Style: dark, glassmorphism
Interactions: 
Tags: atmospheric, effect, design

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
